title: quercus dugesii
intro: Quercus dugesii, also known as the Duge's oak, is a species of evergreen tree that belongs to the beech family, Fagaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and act as an antioxidant. The health benefits of Quercus dugesii include its potential to protect against cardiovascular disease, improve cognitive function, and support immune system health. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as tea, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
